mapper.insert: insert into announcements (title, content, publisher, publisher_role, publish_time, valid_from, valid_to, target_type, target_value, priority, attachments, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{publisher}, #{publisherRole}, #{publishTime}, #{validFrom}, #{validTo}, #{targetType}, #{targetValue}, #{priority}, #{attachments}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
update announcements
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
publisher = #{publisher},
publisher_role = #{publisherRole},
publish_time = #{publishTime},
valid_from = #{validFrom},
valid_to = #{validTo},
target_type = #{targetType},
target_value = #{targetValue},
priority = #{priority},
attachments = #{attachments},
status = #{status},
update_time = NOW()
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select a.*, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcement_read_records r WHERE r.announcement_id = a.id), 0) as read_count from announcements a order by CASE WHEN a.priority = 'important' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, a.create_time desc

select a.*, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcement_read_records r WHERE r.announcement_id = a.id), 0) as read_count from announcements a
and a.title like concat('%',#{title},'%')
and a.status = #{status}
order by CASE WHEN a.priority = 'important' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, a.create_time desc

SELECT * FROM announcements WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM announcements WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM announcements ORDER BY CASE WHEN priority = 'important' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT a.*, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcement_read_records r WHERE r.announcement_id = a.id), 0) as read_count FROM announcements a WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (a.valid_to IS NULL OR a.valid_to > NOW())
AND ( a.target_type = 'ALL' OR a.target_type = 'STUDENT' OR (a.target_type = 'MAJOR' AND a.target_value = #{userInfo}) )
AND ( a.target_type = 'ALL' OR a.target_type = 'TEACHER' OR (a.target_type = 'TEACHER_TYPE' AND a.target_value = #{userInfo}) )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.priority = 'important' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, a.publish_time DESC
